name: poam-automation
description: FedRAMP POA&M lifecycle management and VDR generation. Converts Nessus, Tenable, Qualys, and Wiz scanner exports into a FedRAMP-compliant POA&M, manages the full finding lifecycle, generates FedRAMP 20x VDR reports with live CISA KEV and EPSS enrichment, and produces per-release Product Vulnerability Disclosure Reports.
